---
title: "The Pictorial History of England: Being a History of the People, as well as a History of the Kingdom"
---

## The Pictorial History of England: Being a History of the People, as well as a History of the Kingdom

**Author:** George Lillie Craik
**Date:** 1837-1841
**Imprint:** London: Knight

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
